title: API Request: Export Work Calendar for On-Call Rota Integration
excerpt:
Hi, I’d like to request the ability to export the calendar from Monday.com via API. Specifically, I want to export my on-call calendar for integration with our alerting system, while using Monday.com to manage the rota. 
…

posts.author: samhar01 (Samir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’d like to request the ability to export the calendar from Monday.com via API. Specifically, I want to export my on-call calendar for integration with our alerting system, while using Monday.com to manage the rota.

Workflow:

  • Manage the rota in Monday.com
  • Use a script to export this data as a spreadsheet/JSON
  • Use another script to import the calendar into our alerting system

This would allow Monday.com to serve as our central tool for managing on-call schedules, eliminating the need to update it in multiple places.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @samhar01,

Welcome to the community!

Just as a head’s up, this request is better suited for our apps and API feature request queue so I changed the category of your post.

Best,
Rachel
